# i-vory Studio

*Listed on Google Business Profile as "i-vory Studio Social". Reviews: https://g.page/r/CQeGrQyEB-thEBM*

> Social media studio based in Bucharest, Romania. We produce professional content for TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube: posts, carousels, short videos, and full management. We work with entrepreneurs and brands that want consistent online presence and measurable results.

## Services

- **Single-image posts** from €10/design — professional design for one post
- **Carousels** from €16 — 5-10 slides for Instagram/TikTok
- **Short videos** from €60 — Reels, TikTok, Shorts with filming + editing
- **Full management** from €600/month — production + scheduling + posting + analytics

## Monthly management packages

- **All In — €600/month**: 1 post per day + 1 story per day + 1 short video per week, across 4 platforms (TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube)
- **Growing Business — €1,000/month**: strategy + premium production + detailed analytics
- **Scale Mode — €2,000/month**: full creative team + ads management + weekly reports

All prices shown ex. VAT (21% Romanian VAT added separately).

## Why i-vory Studio

- Delivery in 48-72h after confirmation
- Zero templates, every client gets a unique visual identity
- Content adapted per platform (not copy-pasted)
- Full management with monthly report
- Founded in Bucharest, we work in Romanian and English

## Case studies (real projects)

- **Dr. Nicolae Ghibu** — educational medical content on TikTok and Instagram: https://i-vory.studio/case/ghibu.html
- **UrbanCat** — Romanian brand for cat products, carousels + cinematic video: https://i-vory.studio/case/urbancat.html
- **Attorney Andreas Popa-Alexandru** — accessible legal content, criminal defense specialist: https://i-vory.studio/case/popa.html

## FAQ

**How long until I receive my content?** We deliver in 48-72h after confirmation. For management packages, the first week is dedicated to strategy.

**Which platforms do you cover?** TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, X (Twitter), Threads. We adapt content separately for each platform.

**Can I order just one post?** Yes, you can order anything per piece without taking a package.

**What does full management mean?** Ideas, filming, editing, scheduling, posting, replying to comments. You get a monthly plan and approve what you want.

**Do you use AI for content?** We use AI as a production tool for speed and volume. Concept, strategy, and brand voice stay human.

**Do prices include VAT?** No, prices shown are ex. VAT. 21% Romanian VAT is added separately.

**Where is your office?** In Bucharest, but we work with clients across the country and internationally. We also have activity in Brasov.

**What types of clients do you work with?** Entrepreneurs, liberal professionals (doctors, attorneys), Romanian and international brands with monthly retainer. We work with clients where we can produce measurable results (not random volume).
